title: SCHLEICH HORSE CLUB — 42540 Sofia and Blossom 10 Piece HORSE CLUB Play Set with Rider and Andalusian Mare, Horse Toys for Girls and Boys Ages 5-12
features: BFF adventures: Join artistic and horse-crazy Sofia and her beautiful mare Blossom as they explore the world of Springdale with this horse play set!
Dynamic toys: Sofia is a fully-posable doll. Her arms and legs can be moved to create different standing, seated and horse-mounted positions — she can even hold the reins

A DREAM GIFT FOR HORSE LOVERS OF ALL AGES. Kickstart your son or daughter's animal collection! Used as party decorations or gifts, our high-quality, equestrian toys will light up the face of the birthday girl or boy from 5 years old +

WELCOME TO HORSE CLUB. In this world of friendship and adventure, horses and characters' stories come alive. From foals frolicking on the farm, to stallions racing on the ranch, and the big horse show - it's a horse girl's paradise.

IMAGINATION WITHOUT LIMITS - Schleich toys come in all shapes and sizes to bring stories to life. We value sustainability which is why we created worlds of durable toys that can be treasured for generations to come.
description: From the manufacturer schleich HORSE CLUB — Sofia and Blossom Playset Get ready to enter the wonderful, fun-filled world of Sofia and Blossom! Once they have each other, they can take on anything — cross-country riding, showjumping, dressage and more are all possible. When Sofia isn't following the latest fashion trends or hanging out with her friends, she's spending time with her beloved BFF Blossom, a gorgeous Andalusian horse.
